headline: AI Chips Today - Next-Gen Chips Drive Spatial Intelligence Forward
summary: Mosaic SoC, a semiconductor startup, has raised $3.8 million in a pre-seed funding round to support the development of its next-generation perception chips that aim to enhance real-time spatial intelligence in consumer devices. The company's chips are designed to process visual and positional sensor data efficiently, enabling devices to understand their environment in real-time with minimal power consumption. This innovation targets the growing demand for spatially aware devices like AR...

headline: Can Micron Really Hit $1,000? This Bull Thinks So
summary: Micron (NASDAQ: MU) has been on an extraordinary run. Shares are up 64% year-to-date and have returned 572% over the past year, fueled by an AI memory supercycle that CEO Sanjay Mehrotra calls a defining moment for the company. With shares around $517 after a 53% one-month surge, investors are asking how much higher this ... Can Micron Really Hit $1,000? This Bull Thinks So

headline: The AI Gold Rush Just Hit a New Layer: Here’s Why Sandisk Is Printing Money
summary: The artificial intelligence boom is entering a new phase. For the past two years, investors obsessed over GPUs, data centers, and power consumption. But agentic AI — systems that can reason, plan, and act independently — is changing the equation. These models don’t just need compute. They need enormous amounts of fast memory constantly available ... The AI Gold Rush Just Hit a New Layer: Here’s Why Sandisk Is Printing Money
